title: 2026 GRAMMYS Nominations: Song Of The Year Nominees - GRAMMY.com
text:
2026 GRAMMYS Nominations: Song Of The Year

The Song of the Year category recognizes songwriting excellence for a song released during the eligibility period, regardless of format.

Nominees:
1. Abracadabra - Lady Gaga
2. Anxiety - Doechii
3. APT. - ROSÉ & Bruno Mars
4. DtMF - Bad Bunny
5. Golden - HUNTR/X (featuring EJAE, AUDREY NUNA, REI AMI)
6. luther - Kendrick Lamar featuring SZA
7. Manchild - Sabrina Carpenter
8. WILDFLOWER - Billie Eilsch

These eight songs represent diverse genres and artistic approaches, from pop to hip-hop to K-pop fusion, showcasing the breadth of musical creativity recognized by the Recording Academy.
